title: Prompt
text: Prompt Specify whether the field is included in the prompting sequence. Default is True . Value Description True The field is part of the prompt sequence. False The field is not part of the prompt sequence. The user can give the field focus by placing the mouse cursor in the field, but not by tabbing to it. Equivalent to the NPR field syntax code. Applies To Modeled Field Syntax Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
